languages.text: Себериан слишком полагается на ксеносский клинок. Это мешает ему довериться союзникам.

traits.locale_text: Себериан слишком полагается на ксеносский клинок. Это мешает ему довериться союзникам.

languages.text: Seberian is too reliant on his xenos blade. It is preventing him from trusting his allies.
languages.original_text: Себериан слишком полагается на ксеносский клинок. Это мешает ему довериться союзникам.

Seberian places too much trust in the xenos blade. This prevents him from relying upon his allies.

languages.text: Seberian verlässt sich zu stark auf seine Xenosklinge. Sie verhindert, dass er seinen Verbündeten vertraut.
languages.original_text: Seberian is too reliant on his xenos blade. It is preventing him from trusting his allies.

traits.locale_text: Seberian verlässt sich zu stark auf seine Xenosklinge. Sie verhindert, dass er seinen Verbündeten vertraut.

languages.text: Seberian s'appuie trop sur sa lame xénos, de qui le pousse à négliger ses alliés.
languages.original_text: Seberian is too reliant on his xenos blade. It is preventing him from trusting his allies.

traits.locale_text: Seberian s'appuie trop sur sa lame xénos, de qui le pousse à négliger ses alliés.

languages.text: 塞贝里安过于依赖那把异形刀刃，这让他无法信赖自己的盟友。
languages.original_text: Seberian is too reliant on his xenos blade. It is preventing him from trusting his allies.

traits.locale_text: 塞贝里安过于依赖那把异形刀刃，这让他无法信赖自己的盟友。

languages.text: Seberian depende demasiado de su espada xenos. Le impide confiar en sus aliados.
languages.original_text: Seberian is too reliant on his xenos blade. It is preventing him from trusting his allies.

traits.locale_text: Seberian depende demasiado de su espada xenos. Le impide confiar en sus aliados.

languages.text: Seberian, zeno kılıcına fazlasıyla güveniyor. Bu durum müttefiklerine güvenmesine engel oluyor.
languages.original_text: Seberian is too reliant on his xenos blade. It is preventing him from trusting his allies.

traits.locale_text: Seberian, zeno kılıcına fazlasıyla güveniyor. Bu durum müttefiklerine güvenmesine engel oluyor.

languages.text: シベリアは異種族の剣に頼りすぎている。それは彼を味方に信頼させない。
languages.original_text: Seberian is too reliant on his xenos blade. It is preventing him from trusting his allies.
